_meta.dataset: Hunt findings 2026-06-09: (1) registered ФАС приказ for 2026 container +5% indexation; (2) Таблица N10 container типоразмер→scheme map; (3) reefer N30/N31 cell verification. Verbatim-or-flag. NO fabrication.
_meta.groundTruthUntouched: This file is findings-only. It does NOT modify tariff oracles (1067770/187344/82816/101035.52), goldenBatch0609, distances (2444/699/3108/1432), or any rate seed. Confidence model green/yellow/red preserved.

hunt1_container_plus5_order.question: What is the REGISTERED ФАС приказ number for the 2026 container +5% indexation (the value that currently keeps container YELLOW)?
hunt1_container_plus5_order.status: PARTIAL — registered order IDENTIFIED by title + Минюст registration metadata; operative +5% clause text NOT byte-verbatim accessible (paywalled).

finding.fullTitle: О внесении изменений в приказ ФАС России от 10 декабря 2015 г. N 1226/15 «Об индексации ставок тарифов, сборов и платы за перевозку грузов и услуги по использованию инфраструктуры при перевозках грузов, выполняемые (оказываемые) ОАО „Российские железные дороги“»
finding.minustRegSource: https://www.consultant.ru/document/cons_doc_LAW_519208/ (КонсультантПлюс landing page — title + Минюст reg.№ rendered free; body behind paywall)
finding.amends: приказ ФАС 1226/15 от 10.12.2015 (индексация ставок тарифов РЖД)

hunt1_container_plus5_order.verbatimGap: The OPERATIVE TEXT (точная формулировка пункта вводящего коэффициент 1,05 на контейнерные отправки 2026) was NOT obtained byte-verbatim. КонсультантПлюс (cons_doc_LAW_519208) shows only title+метаданные+Минюст-рег; body is paywalled ('available only during scheduled free-access windows'). ppt.ru consolidated 1226/15 (n-1226-15-45415) does NOT yet reflect the 886/25 amendment — its tables stop at 2025 and contain NO 2026 +5% container clause and NO mention of 886/25. publication.pravo.gov.ru fetch failed (certificate verification error).
hunt1_container_plus5_order.importantCaveat: Multiple search summaries CONFLATE приказ 886/25 (registered 05.11.2025, Минюст 84208) with the EARLIER ДРАФТ order (проект на regulation.gov.ru, опубликован 17.10.2025, антикоррупц.экспертиза до 24.10.2025) whose пояснительная записка first announced the +5%. These are different documents. 886/25 is the registered indexation order amending 1226/15 — it is the most likely carrier of the registered +5% clause, but the body text was NOT seen, so attribution of the +5% clause SPECIFICALLY to 886/25 is INFERRED from the order's title/scope + press, NOT verbatim-confirmed.
hunt1_container_plus5_order.recommendation: Container stays YELLOW. Promote to GREEN only after a human reads the operative пункт of 886/25 (or its appendix) byte-verbatim via КонсультантПлюс/ГАРАНТ paid access or publication.pravo.gov.ru by Минюст N 84208, confirming the literal 1,05 coefficient on контейнерные отправки for 2026 and the термические exclusion. The 84208 Минюст number + 886/25 are the precise lookup keys to hand a human.
sourcesTried: https://www.consultant.ru/document/cons_doc_LAW_519208/ (886/25 landing — title+Минюст reg free; BODY PAYWALLED)
https://pravo.ppt.ru/prikaz/fas/n-1226-15-45415 (consolidated 1226/15 — does NOT reflect 886/25, tables stop at 2025, no 2026 +5% clause)
http://publication.pravo.gov.ru/search (certificate verification error — could not fetch)

hunt2_table_n10_container_scheme_map.question: Find Табл.N10 container типоразмер→scheme map (to promote container reduction).
hunt2_table_n10_container_scheme_map.status: PARTIAL — table located & loaded-container core confirmed across TWO independent fetches; empty/own-use scheme cells + coefficients are LLM-extraction (NOT byte-verbatim) and diverged between passes.
hunt2_table_n10_container_scheme_map.tableLocation: ТР-1 2026 (приказ ФАС 894/25), Приложение N1, Таблица N 10
hunt2_table_n10_container_scheme_map.tableTitle: Тарифные схемы, применяемые при расчете тарифа на перевозку по инфраструктуре РЖД контейнерной отправкой грузов в контейнерах общего парка и собственных (арендованных) контейнерах (подпункт 23.2 пункта 23)

loadedContainerMap_CONFIRMED._note: Container size → (общий парк loaded scheme / собств.-аренд. loaded scheme). CONFIRMED: both fetches agree, and these match tr1-i-belts-container.json belts[] schemes 85-94 exactly. This is the keying that lets container reduction be promoted: size×ownership→scheme.

emptyAndCoefficientCells_NOT_VERBATIM._warning: These cells DIVERGED between the two WebFetch passes (LLM rendering of an HTML table) — treat as UNVERIFIED leads, NOT seed-grade. DO NOT promote into a rate path without human byte-verbatim sweep of Табл.N10 + Табл.N24 (груженый) / a separate порожний table.
emptyAndCoefficientCells_NOT_VERBATIM.emptyContainerSchemes_pass1: 3т→? 5т→? 10т→97 20ft→98 40ft→99 (one pass), порожний 90-94 (other pass) — INCONSISTENT, NOT TRUSTED
emptyAndCoefficientCells_NOT_VERBATIM.coefficientDivergence: 20ft loaded coefficient differs between passes (1.28/1.5 vs 1.5-only) → NOT verbatim. Must be read by a human from Табл.N10 source before use.

hunt2_table_n10_container_scheme_map.promotionGuidance: Container REDUCTION promotion needs the (containerSize→scheme) keying — that loaded core IS confirmed (above) and already matches the seed. To finish: a human must byte-verbatim transcribe Табл.N10's loaded-mass coefficient column + the empty(порожний)-container scheme column from sudact (or garant/cntd mirror), since those cells are LLM-divergent here. The 5 size→scheme rows for LOADED общий-парк/собств. are safe to rely on.
